prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This guidance specifically addresses the requirements and procedures for forestry Environmental Impact Assessments (EIA) in England. It references the Forestry Commission, which operates within England, and does not include regulations or considerations for Scotland or other UK nations.
